sqlMap.select: /*PledgeManage.selectPledgeInfoList*/ SELECT A.PLEDGE_INFO_ID || '_' || '00000000000' AS PLEDGE_ID , A.PLEDGE_INFO_NM || '(' || SUBSTRING(A.PLEDGE_BEGIN_YMD, 1, 4) || '-' || SUBSTRING(A.PLEDGE_BEGIN_YMD, 5, 2) || '-' || SUBSTRING(A.PLEDGE_BEGIN_YMD, 7, 2) || ' ~ ' || SUBSTRING(A.PLEDGE_END_YMD, 1, 4) || '-' || SUBSTRING(A.PLEDGE_END_YMD, 5, 2) || '-' || SUBSTRING(A.PLEDGE_END_YMD, 7, 2) || ')' AS PLEDGE_INFO , A.PLEDGE_INFO_ID AS PLEDGE_INFO_ID , A.PLEDGE_INFO_NM AS PLEDGE_INFO_NM , A.PLEDGE_BEGIN_YMD AS PLEDGE_BEGIN_YMD , A.PLEDGE_END_YMD AS PLEDGE_END_YMD , '00000000000' AS PLEDGE_BIZ_ID , '00000000000' AS UP_PLEDGE_BIZ_ID , '' AS PLEDGE_BIZ_FG , '' PLEDGE_BIZ_NM , 0 AS PLEDGE_BIZ_LEVEL , 0 AS PLEDGE_BIZ_SEQ , CASE WHEN (SELECT COUNT(1) FROM TB_PLEDGEBIZ Z WHERE Z.PLEDGE_INFO_ID = A.PLEDGE_INFO_ID AND Z.DEL_YN = 'N') > 0 THEN 'false' ELSE 'true' END AS IS_LEAF , '00000000000' || '_' || '00000000000' AS PARENT , 'true' AS EXPANDED , 'true' AS LOADED , 0 AS "LEVEL" FROM TB_PLEDGEINFO A WHERE 1 = 1 AND A.PLEDGE_INFO_ID = #pledgeInfoId# AND A.DEL_YN = 'N' UNION ALL SELECT T.PLEDGE_INFO_ID || '_' || T.PLEDGE_BIZ_ID AS PLEDGE_ID , T.PLEDGE_BIZ_FG || '. ' || T.PLEDGE_BIZ_NM AS PLEDGE_INFO , A.PLEDGE_INFO_ID AS PLEDGE_INFO_ID , A.PLEDGE_INFO_NM AS PLEDGE_INFO_NM , A.PLEDGE_BEGIN_YMD AS PLEDGE_BEGIN_YMD , A.PLEDGE_END_YMD AS PLEDGE_END_YMD , T.PLEDGE_BIZ_ID AS PLEDGE_BIZ_ID , T.UP_PLEDGE_BIZ_ID AS UP_PLEDGE_BIZ_ID , T.PLEDGE_BIZ_FG AS PLEDGE_BIZ_FG , T.PLEDGE_BIZ_NM AS PLEDGE_BIZ_NM , T.PLEDGE_BIZ_LEVEL AS PLEDGE_BIZ_LEVEL , T.PLEDGE_BIZ_SEQ AS PLEDGE_BIZ_SEQ , CASE WHEN (SELECT COUNT(1) FROM TB_PLEDGEBIZ Z WHERE Z.UP_PLEDGE_BIZ_ID = T.PLEDGE_BIZ_ID AND Z.DEL_YN = 'N') > 0 THEN 'false' ELSE 'true' END AS IS_LEAF , T.PLEDGE_INFO_ID || '_' || T.UP_PLEDGE_BIZ_ID AS PARENT , 'true' AS EXPANDED , 'true' AS LOADED , T.PLEDGE_BIZ_LEVEL AS "LEVEL" FROM (SELECT A.PLEDGE_BIZ_ID , A.UP_PLEDGE_BIZ_ID , A.PLEDGE_BIZ_FG , A.PLEDGE_BIZ_NM , A.PLEDGE_BIZ_LEVEL , A.PLEDGE_BIZ_SEQ , A.PLEDGE_INFO_ID FROM TB_PLEDGEBIZ A , (SELECT BB.PLEDGE_BIZ_ID FROM TB_PLEDGEBIZ BB WHERE 1 = 1 AND BB.PLEDGE_INFO_ID = #pledgeInfoId# AND BB.DEL_YN = 'N' ) B WHERE 1 = 1 AND A.PLEDGE_BIZ_ID = B.PLEDGE_BIZ_ID START WITH A.UP_PLEDGE_BIZ_ID = '00000000000' CONNECT BY PRIOR A.PLEDGE_BIZ_ID = A.UP_PLEDGE_BIZ_ID ORDER SIBLINGS BY A.PLEDGE_BIZ_SEQ ) T , TB_PLEDGEINFO A WHERE 1 = 1 AND T.PLEDGE_INFO_ID = A.PLEDGE_INFO_ID
sqlMap.update: /*PledgeManage.deletePledgeInfo*/ UPDATE TB_PLEDGEINFO SET DEL_YN = 'Y' , MODI_ID = #userId# , MODI_DATE = SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE 1 = 1 AND PLEDGE_INFO_ID = #pledgeInfoId#
/*PledgeManage.deletePledgeBiz*/ UPDATE TB_PLEDGEBIZ SET DEL_YN = 'Y' , MODI_ID = #userId# , MODI_DATE = SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE 1 = 1 AND PLEDGE_BIZ_ID = #pledgeBizId#
